{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400215450661FF0B7B5C88DB146"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7517741810343740184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，多出点这样的作品"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750378280,"group_id":"7370482249189297214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2/U9ABOJnzioAaqhxzGBMw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"59179698880","user_name":"爱吃鱿鱼沙拉的青龙尊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59179698880","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7370482249189297214","book_info":{"abstract":"（主角无敌+多女主+诙谐幽默+各种鬼怪妖魔+神医）
      
         林阳奉师命下山帮女总裁抓鬼，之后为了更好的开展业务，开了一家灵异道馆，当他小有名气时。

　　性感妩媚的主任医生，三番两次的遇到血色婴儿找她要妈妈。

　　超人气尤物大明星，为了在娱乐圈不被潜规则，能够一直红下去，用自己的血喂养鬼童，来达到目地，最终遭到反噬。

　　五百强上市公司的首席美女大律师，中元节那天鬼门大开，被色鬼纠缠。

　　……

　　她们纷纷来到灵异道馆，请求林阳帮忙抓鬼。

　　只是帮着帮着，林阳忽然发现，她们一个个都在慢慢的靠近自己。
